_note: Conventions summarized from https://docs.frappe.io/framework/user/en/api/rest and the Document API docs. {doctype} is the DocType name URL-encoded (spaces -> %20). {name} is the document's primary key (often its auto-generated series name). Responses wrap the payload in a 'data' key (resource API) or 'message' key (method API); errors carry 'exc' and 'exc_type'.

auth.notes: Recommended for server-to-server / headless integration. Key/secret generated per User.

apis.purpose: List records of a DocType. Query params: fields=["a","b"], filters=[[field,op,value]], or_filters, order_by, limit_start, limit_page_length (default 20), as_dict. Respects role/user permissions.
Fetch one full document by name (including child tables). ?expand_links=True expands linked references.
Create a new document; JSON body holds field values (and child table rows). Returns the created doc.
Partial update (PATCH-like): send only changed fields. Cannot directly change docstatus for submit/cancel.
Delete a document by name (subject to delete permission and link constraints).
Get a filtered count for a DocType (doctype + filters params). frappe.client also exposes get_value, get_list, set_value, insert, save.
Read specific field(s) of a document without fetching the whole record (doctype, filters, fieldname).
Invoke a server-side @frappe.whitelist() Python function (read-only). Args passed as query params.
Invoke a state-changing whitelisted method; auto-commits the DB transaction. Args in JSON body or form-encoded.
Authenticate with usr + pwd to establish a session cookie.
Invalidate the current session.
Submit a document (docstatus 0 -> 1). Pass the doc JSON; runs validation and on_submit hooks. (Some integrations submit via the doc's own whitelisted methods.)
Cancel a submitted document (docstatus 1 -> 2), reversing GL/stock effects via on_cancel hooks.
Create a document by passing a full doc JSON object; alternative to POST /api/resource.
Execute a saved Report (report_name + filters JSON) and return columns + result rows. Used for General Ledger, Trial Balance, Stock Balance, etc.
List with explicit doctype/fields/filters/order_by/limit args via method endpoint (alternative to /api/resource).
Upload a file (multipart/form-data); optionally attach to a doctype/docname and mark private/public.
Fetch a document (doctype + name) as a method call; complements the resource GET.
Retrieve a DocType definition (fields, permissions) since DocType is itself a DocType - useful for schema discovery.
Configure outbound HTTP callbacks on document events (after_insert, on_submit, etc.) - the inverse of the inbound REST API.
